prompt: why is this function crashing when I call fetch_user_profile(None)?
expectations: The agent identifies the missing None check or boundary condition in the traceback.
The agent locates the relevant lines in the source file.
The agent proposes a safe lookup or early exit to prevent a NoneType traceback.

prompt: debug the connection timeout error we get when running db connection checks
expectations: The agent inspects connection configuration parameters (host, port, timeout limits).
The agent isolates network or credentials configuration problems.
The agent suggests testing connectivity or adjusting the retry/timeout logic.
